boundaries.summary: Phase 20 model risk tooling reads manifests and evaluation snapshots, emits deterministic scores and Markdown assurance reports, and does not change GovAI verdict semantics, billing, ledger storage, or database schemas.

evaluation_snapshot_schema.summary: Structured model evaluation snapshot with evaluation, safety, robustness, fairness pillars and diagnostics counts for deterministic scoring.

evaluation_signals.summary: Task fit and documentation completeness scores anchor offline evaluation planning before production promotion.
Policy violation rates, harmful-output eval pass rates, and open red-team findings surface safety posture without hosting model traffic.
Perturbation degradation and jailbreak success rates approximate robustness under controlled offline probes.
Maximum group metric deltas and fairness eval coverage summarise fairness evidence for assurance reviews.

non_goals: Phase 20 does not train, host, or serve models.
Scores are not legal conformity statements or EU AI Act Annex IV certificates.
Tooling does not mutate billing configuration, ledger files, or enforcement modes.

operational_probes.description: Schema and reference path validation for this manifest.
operational_probes.name: validate_model_risk_manifest

operational_probes.description: Schema validation for the sample evaluation snapshot.
operational_probes.name: validate_model_evaluation_snapshot

operational_probes.description: Deterministic composite model risk score with per-pillar sub-scores.
operational_probes.name: model_risk_score

operational_probes.description: Aggregated diagnostics across manifest, snapshot, Makefile wiring, and documentation paths.
operational_probes.name: model_risk_check

operational_probes.description: Deterministic Markdown assurance report from a single snapshot.
operational_probes.name: generate_model_assurance_report

summary: GovAI Phase 20 model risk manifest indexes evaluation snapshot schema, deterministic scoring weights, referenced operator documentation, and stdlib validation probes. It frames assurance as engineering evidence, not runtime enforcement.
